CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-12-2024 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B), CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE (CCP) SECTION 583.410, AND CCP SECTION 583.420(A)(1). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and Code of Civil Procedure (CCP) section 583.410 and CCP section 583.420 (a)(1). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Guandique. Proceedings not reported. (610)
